zh.lifeSummary: 當Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort於大約1000年出生在法國豪-諾門迪艾艾福時，他的父親Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut41歲，母親Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent32歲。他於1019年與Bertrade de France在法國i萊-德-福朗斯結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1052年4月之後在他的家鄉，埋葬在法國i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort于大约1000年出生在法国豪-諾門迪艾艾福时，他的父亲Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut41岁，母亲Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent32岁。他于1019年与Bertrade de France在法国i萊-德-福朗斯结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1052年4月之后在他的家乡，埋葬在法国i萊-德-福朗斯易維林斯蒙特福吉利曼利。

nameMeanings.name: De
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Montfort
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French and Breton: variant of   Monfort   1. This surname is most common in Brittany and Haute-Savoie. See also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort: habitational name from Montfoort in Utrecht. It is a cognate of 1 above (see Monfort 1) and also its altered form (or perhaps vice versa).
English (of Norman origin): very rare variant of   Mountford  , a cognate of 1 above.

variants.name: Monfort
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French/Haitian Jacques, Marcel, Monique, Wilner.

French and Breton: habitational name from any of numerous places called Montfort, from Old French mont ‘hill’ (see Mont 1) + fort ‘strong, impregnable’ (from Latin fortis). This surname is by far most common in Brittany. It is also found in Haiti. Compare Montfort 1, see also 2 below.
Altered form of Dutch Montfoort, a variant of Montfort 2 and also a cognate of the French name in 1 above and an altered form of its variant Montfort 1 (or perhaps vice versa).

variants.name: Monforte
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Angelo, Salvatore, Carmela, Carmine, Rocco, Rosaria, Sal.  Spanish Carlos, Francisco, Luis, Medardo.

Italian and Spanish: habitational name from any of numerous places called Monforte, from Latin mons ‘mountain’ (genitive montis) + fortis ‘strong’, probably a reference to the strategic position of these locations.
English (of Norman origin): variant of   Montfort  . This form of the surname is rare in Britain.

nameMeanings.name: Amaury
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Cecile, Chantal, Christophe, Jean-Luc, Lucien, Marcel, Michel, Monique, Phillippe, Sylvanie.  Spanish Jose, Ruben, Carlos, Manuel, Alvaro, Antolin, Luis, Miguel, Pedro, Ramon, Roberto, Salvador.
French (mainly southern): from a regional variant of the personal name   Maurin  .
French: from a shortened form of the personal name Amaury (see Amery ).

en.lifeSummary: When Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort was born about 1000, in Évreux, Eure, Upper Normandy, France, his father, Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut, was 41 and his mother, Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent, was 32. He married Bertrade de France in 1019, in Île-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. He died after April 1052, in his hometown, and was buried in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort est né environ 1000, à Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, France, son père, Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Bertrade de France en 1019, à Île-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé après avril 1052, dans sa ville natale, et a été enterré à Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, France.

de.lifeSummary: Als Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort um 1000 in Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut 41 und seine Mutter Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent 32. Er hat 1019 in Île-de-France, Frankreich Bertrade de France geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb nach April 1052 in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort è nato il circa 1000 nel Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, il suo padre, Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent, aveva 32 anni. Lui sposato Bertrade de France nel 1019, nel Île-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì dopo il aprile 1052, nel sua cittadina, e fu sepolto a Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfortが約1000年にフランスハウテ-ノーマンディエウアevレウックスで生まれた時，父Guillaume de Montfort-Hainautは41歳，母Albreda d'Esperon de Nogentは32歳であった。1019年にフランスiレ-デ-フランスでBertrade de Franceと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1052年4月以後に故郷で死去し，フランスiレ-デ-フランスイベラインスモントフォート-ル'アマアウリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort(이)가 대략 1000년 프랑스 하테-노먼디 우르 e브레우스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1019년 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스에서 Bertrade de France(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1052년 4월 이후 그의 고향에서 사망했으며 프랑스 i레-데-프랜스 이벨라이네스 몽포트-'아모리에 묻혔다.

mn.Abt 1000–Aft April 1052: ойролцоогоор 1000 он–1052 оны Дөрөвдүгээр сараас хойш

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort nasceu aproximadamente 1000, em Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, França, seu pai, Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Bertrade de France em 1019, em Île-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu após abril de 1052, em sua cidade natal, e foi sepultado em Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, França.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort родился около 1000 г. в местности eвреукс, эур, хауте-норманди, Франция, его отцу по имени Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Bertrade de France в 1019 г. в местности iле-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер после апрель 1052 г. в его родном городе и был похоронен в местности монтфорт-л'амаури, ивелаинесь, iле-де-фрэнс, Франция.

sm.Abt 1000–Aft April 1052: e tusa o le 1000–ina ua ma'ea le Aperila 1052

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Count Amaury Seigneur De Montfort nació aproximadamente 1000, en Évreux, Eure, Haute-Normandie, Francia, su papá, Guillaume de Montfort-Hainaut, tenía 41 años y su mamá, Albreda d'Esperon de Nogent, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Bertrade de France en 1019, en Île-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió después de abril de 1052, en su pueblo, y fue sepultado en Montfort-l'Amaury, Yvelines, Île-de-France, Francia.
